query:
SELECT l.id, c.code, l.title
FROM lessons l
JOIN courses c ON l.courseId = c.id
WHERE l.id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT lessonId FROM quiz_questions)
ORDER BY c.code, l.lessonOrder
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT l.id, c.code, l.title
FROM lessons l
JOIN courses c ON l.courseId = c.id
WHERE l.id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT lessonId FROM quiz_questions)
ORDER BY c.code, l.lessonOrder
LIMIT 20;
